title: Race condition in async counter
author: contributor
pr_description: Adds request count tracking to the analytics module.
diff:
--- a/analytics.py
+++ b/analytics.py
@@ -5,5 +5,10 @@ import asyncio
 
 request_count = 0
 
+async def track_request():
+    global request_count
+    request_count += 1
file_context:
import asyncio

request_count = 0

async def track_request():
    global request_count
    request_count += 1

gold_issues.description: Race condition: request_count += 1 is not atomic in async context. Concurrent calls cause lost updates.
